tagline.value: Primary Care in a Functional Model

practice.description: Functional medicine and concierge primary care clinic addressing the root causes of disease through preventative, personalized care. Specializes in hormone balance, IV therapy, weight loss, anti-aging, digestive health, and alternative cancer treatment.

locations.note: Multiple practitioners suggest brick-and-mortar location; contact page has appointment form

services.name: Functional Medicine
services.description: Treats root causes of illness using nutrition, lifestyle, and personalized care for long-term health restoration.

services.name: Hormone Replacement Therapy (HRT)
services.description: Bioidentical hormone replacement for increased energy, improved mood, and overall well-being.

services.name: IV Therapy
services.description: Rapid nutrient and medication delivery directly into the bloodstream.

services.name: Weight Loss
services.description: Naturopathic and functional medicine approaches targeting root causes of weight issues.

services.name: Anti-Aging
services.description: Personalized anti-aging treatment plans to help patients look and feel their best.

services.name: Digestive Health
services.description: Gastric screening and therapies to restore gut balance and address root causes of digestive issues.

services.name: Concierge Medicine
services.description: Direct, personalized access to physician with priority care — no long waits, no rushed visits.

services.name: Alternative Cancer Treatment
services.description: Integrative cancer treatment combining alternative and traditional therapies.

services.name: Nutrition
services.description: Personalized nutritional guidance based on individual health needs.

services.name: Peptide Therapy
services.description: Peptide-based therapies for cellular repair, energy, and health optimization.

services.name: Athlete Recovery
services.description: Recovery-focused programs for athletes using functional medicine principles.

differentiators: Concierge medicine with direct doctor access
AI Visibility Score 22 — cited in ChatGPT and AI Overviews

social_proof.name: Lauren
social_proof.quote: You're not just a number here — you're family!! Shannon is super kind and knows exactly how to get to your root causes of your problems with solutions that enable you to thrive!!

social_proof.name: Valerie Heapes
social_proof.quote: I feel like I've got such a thorough overview of my health and have been given specific steps to take to continue living life to the fullest and aging with mindfulness and confidence.

social_proof.name: Judy Zabik
social_proof.quote: Dr. Lewerenz is spot on with his prognosis on health issues that other doctors hadn't been able to resolve. He will try to resolve health issues with natural remedies as well as conventional medicine. He's the BEST!

social_proof.name: Steve Sandison
social_proof.quote: Dr. L and his team do a fantastic job ensuring patient care while maintaining an empathetic, patient-focused environment.

semrush_top_keywords.keyword: how long after starting hrt do you feel a difference
